terminal
curl \
 -H 'Authorization: Apikey your-api-key-here' \
 -F 'video=@/path/to/your/video.mp4' \
 -F 'title="Your Awesome Title"' \
 -F 'user="test"' \
 -F 'platform[]=tiktok' \
 -F 'platform[]=instagram' \
 -F 'platform[]=youtube' \
 -X POST https://api.upload-post.com/api/upload

We focus on making your work simpler and more efficient.

Manual uploads are slow

You spend too much time uploading the same files. Businesses and entrepreneurs need faster ways.

Too expensive

High costs can be a barrier. We believe in fair pricing, especially for small businesses and entrepreneurs.

Social media APIs are a pain

Creating an app for each social media, handling OAuth flows, and dealing with different APIs takes a lot of time.

Hard to use

Your time and money matter. Do not waste them.

Key Features

Simplify your social media workflow with our powerful platform designed for content creators and marketers.

One-Click Upload

Upload your video once and let Upload-Post distribute it across all your connected social media accounts effortlessly.

Save time with streamlined video sharing

API Integration + Analytics

Upload to TikTok, Facebook, LinkedIn, Threads, Instagram, Youtube and X. Plus get analytics and metrics: views, likes, comments and engagement data from all platforms.

Post + track performance in one API

Secure and Private

We only process the data needed to provide the service, as described in our Privacy Policy.

Built with official APIs, OAuth authentication, and security best practices

Start Posting for Free

Get started in just a few simple steps and streamline your social media workflow

Create Account

2

Connect your social media accounts where you want to start uploading content.

Upload your content through our dashboard, API, or automation tools.

Publish your content across TikTok, Instagram, YouTube and all supported platforms.

Easy Integration with Automation Tools

Connect Upload-Post with your favorite automation platforms — or with your AI agent through MCP

N8N Integration

Seamlessly integrate Upload-Post with N8N to create powerful automated workflows. Connect your video uploads with other business processes through our robust API.

Official n8n Node Available

Automate cross-platform content distribution
Connect with your existing tools and workflows

Visual workflow builder

MCP Server

Plug Upload-Post directly into Claude, Cursor and any other MCP-compatible AI agent. The assistant gets 40 tools to publish, schedule, analyze and manage social media on your behalf.

No-code, just paste your API key

Hosted at mcp.upload-post.com — open-source server, audit it on GitHub.

Works with Claude Desktop, Claude Code & Cursor
40 tools covering every public endpoint
Self-host with one Docker command if you prefer
 View Integration Guide
Claude Code Skill

Publish to social media straight from your terminal with the Upload-Post skill for Claude Code. Tell Claude to post a video, carousel or thread in plain English — it handles the API for you.

One-command install

npx skills add Upload-Post/upload-post-skill — free & open source.

Frequently Asked Questions

Find answers to common questions about our platform

Do scheduled posts perform as well as manual ones?

Yes! Scheduled posts perform just as well as manual ones when your content is relevant and high quality. Modern feeds are increasingly interest-based, so what matters most is the value of your post—not whether you clicked Publish or scheduled it. Scheduling helps you stay consistent and hit optimal times without sacrificing reach.

Is UploadPost safe to use with my accounts?
How does UploadPost handle uploads under the hood? Do you use rotating IPs?
Does Upload-Post store my personal data?
Can I add the same social media account to multiple Upload-Post accounts?
How much time can I save using Upload-Post?
Is Upload-Post compatible with all social media platforms?
Can I customize how my videos are posted?
How does Upload-Post adapt my content to each platform's requirements?
Do I need a subscription to use Upload-Post?
How does Upload-Post handle sensitive information?
Can my SaaS platform, agency, or tool integrate Upload-Post for my own users?
